name: Zucchini Pizza
recipeIngredient: 1 Green Pepper, peeled, seeded, and cut into thin slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onion in butter until soft.
2. Add tomato sauce, oregano, basil, salt, and garlic. Simmer for 10 minutes.
3. Mix zucchini with eggs and half of the grated cheese. Press mixture into a 10-by-15-inch pan (jelly roll pan may be used).
4. Bake in a 400-degree oven for 10 minutes.
5. Spoon sauce on baked zucchini. Arrange pepper strips and mushrooms on top.
6. Sprinkle with remaining shredded cheese and Parmesan.
7. Bake in a 400-degree oven for about 25-30 minutes, or until the top is crisp and bubbly.
